Computer Science Student

Shengming Zhou

I am a computer science student at the University of Minnesota. My background also includes undergraduate study in mathematics, and I am broadly interested in databases, mathematical methods, and research-oriented systems work.

This site is intentionally simple. The homepage is just an introduction, while the rest of the material lives in separate pages for blog posts, contact details, and a downloadable CV.

Current Interests

Research and study

I am especially interested in databases, mathematical methods, and the way theoretical ideas can be turned into concrete computational work.

Pages

Navigation

  • CV for a concise academic record.
  • Contact for email and external links.
  • Blog for occasional notes and future writing.

Brief Note

I prefer this site to remain selective rather than exhaustive. It is meant to be a clear starting point, with the CV and contact pages carrying most of the formal information.

Shengming Zhou
